title: Snack Chef
description: A calm real-kitchen coaching session for making banana coins or toast with a grown-up nearby, from clean hands through cleanup.
learningGoals: Practice safe handling of a butter knife with grown-up supervision
Build independence while preparing a simple snack
Include cleanup as part of cooking
interactionModel: tap the large done row after each real-world kitchen step; timed steps coach slow, careful work
feedbackModel: calm spoken sous-chef coaching with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; safety reminders are natural and success ends with eating

modes.title: Banana Coins
modes.skill: safe banana preparation, sequencing, and cleanup

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
